steps.title: Find the clause boundary
steps.content: The sentence first says the exhibition set out to provide an overview through the 1950s. It then adds another independent clause: its efforts were largely successful. Those clauses need a proper coordinating connection.

steps.title: Apply comma and conjunction
steps.content: Choice A uses only a comma, creating a comma splice. Choice B uses no punctuation, creating a run-on. Choice C uses a conjunction without the needed comma before it. The answer is D.
